VERTICAL - Enum constant in enum class microui.constants.Orientation
Vertical orientation - components are arranged or operate in a top-to-bottom manner.
VERY_SLOW - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode
Hooks are called approximately every 128ms (~8fps).
View - Class in microui.core.base
Abstract base class for all visual elements in MicroUI.
View() - Constructor for class microui.core.base.View
Constructs a new View with default values.
Visible - Interface in microui.core.interfaces
Interface for components that have visibility states.
